ref: Abraham and Isaac went back to the servants who had come with him, and they returned to Abraham's home in Beersheba. The Children of Nahor
text: Ɔmmɔ kama ni, Abraham ɔ́sɔ únwini úsie nwuna kabla bablane kudɔ. Na bénwini bésie Beer-Seba. Na Abraham útélie Beer-Seba mmɔ. Bebi Bani Nahor Ɔ́wɔ
translated: His wife Kama, Abraham's wife, gave birth to a son before they went to the land. And they named him Beer-Seba. And Abraham lived in Beer-Seba with his wife. The sons of Nahor were

ref: Hamor and Shechem liked what was said.
text: Bana kasusu kammɔ káda Sekem ku ɔti Hamor kubiti.
translated: The sons of Hamor father of Shechem gave her one hundred pieces of silver.

ref: Finally, they reached Bethel, also known as Luz.
text: Yakob ku anwu badi bébedu Betel kesii kani basɔ baalɔ banii Lus.
translated: Yacob went to the house of God at Bethel and built an altar there and called the place El Bethel, that is God of Bethel, but formerly the name of the city was Luz.

ref: and said, “Please come to my home where I can serve you.
text: Amu na ɔ́su ɔnini, “Ati, si ánu-mi áti ka lɛ́manku ni, tebo tavi ami ƒula kabla ɔblane.
translated: They said to the hunter, "Father, if you have a child in the town, we will give you a wife before the year is out."

ref: I command them to shine on the earth.” And that's what happened.
text: Na bukeye lidu lɛmɛni lɛsɔ lɛkya kayaa na buteekeye teewi kalɔ lɛlɔ.” Na úbo úte lɛni.
translated: And the elder said, "The matter of the farm is not a matter of the house, and the matter of the house is not a matter of the farm." And that is the truth.
